title: DeepSeek-Prover-V2
summary: 88.9% miniF2F, 49/658 PutnamBench. Subgoal decomposition + RL for formal theorem proving.

title: Goedel-Prover-V2
summary: 90.4% miniF2F with 8B model, demonstrating small models can compete in formal proving.

title: Kimina-Prover
summary: First demonstration that model scale matters for theorem proving. 16.46% Pass@32 on FormalMATH.

title: FormalMATH: Benchmarking Formal Mathematical Reasoning of LLMs
summary: 5,560 formally verified Lean4 statements spanning high school to research level mathematics.

title: Seed-Prover 1.5
summary: 88% PutnamBench. Agentic Prover architecture with iterative refinement.

title: HorizonMath
summary: PROVOCATIVE: First benchmark measuring AI mathematical discovery capability. GPT-5.4 Pro improved 2 known optimal results.

title: Aristotle (Harmonic): IMO Gold + First AI Formal Proof of Open Conjecture
summary: PROVOCATIVE: IMO gold medal + first AI-generated formal proof of an open conjecture (Erdos #124).

title: AlphaProof
summary: PROVOCATIVE: IMO silver medal but ~500 TPU-days per problem. Raises debate on efficiency of formal proving.
